description: As the IT Mobility Manager, extend Snipe-IT to track corporate SIM cards. Configure the system with custom fields 'Phone Number' and 'Carrier' (Format: ANY) grouped in a 'Telecom Data' fieldset. Create an asset category named 'SIM Cards' using this fieldset, a manufacturer named 'Telecom Providers', and a model named '5G Business SIM'. Create and check out the following assets to their corresponding mobile devices: SIM-001 (Serial: '89148000000000012345', Phone Number: '800-480-1001', Carrier: 'Verizon') to Asset 'MOB-001'; SIM-002 (Serial: '89148000000000067890', Phone Number: '800-480-1002', Carrier: 'Verizon') to Asset 'MOB-002'; and SIM-003 (Serial: '89141000000000054321', Phone Number: '800-410-1003', Carrier: 'AT&T') to Asset 'MOB-003'.
